summary: Opening Range Breakout (ORB) for NinjaTrader 8: define an opening range window, trade the breakout (often with a retest), optionally require a Fair Value Gap (FVG) for entry, size risk with Risk Adjusted quantity, and use Tick Replay for realistic tests. A valid license is required before the strategy will trade.

userGuide.title: Opening Range Breakout Strategy – User Guide (NinjaTrader 8)
userGuide.intro: How to install, configure, and run the Opening Range Breakout strategy in NinjaTrader 8. Follow the same workflow as on the official strategy page; add screenshots after each step if you document locally.

steps.title: Import the strategy
steps.body: Open NinjaTrader 8. Go to Tools → Import → NinjaScript Add-On. Select the strategy package you received and complete the import. Restart NinjaTrader if prompted.

steps.title: Configure the chart data series
steps.body: Open a new chart. Set the instrument (e.g. MES), 1-minute timeframe, Price based on Last, and enable Tick Replay. Use a Custom Range for historical testing. Keep Trading Hours on Use instrument settings.

steps.title: Enable global Tick Replay
steps.body: Go to Tools → Options → Market Data. Under Historical, enable Show Tick Replay and Get data from server. Required for accurate historical fills and strategy behavior.

steps.title: Add the strategy to the chart
steps.body: Right-click the chart → Strategies. Select ORB_STRATEGY (or the installed strategy name), click Add. It appears under Configured strategies.

steps.title: Strategy parameters
steps.body: Set Time Zone to EST, Open Range Time to 09:30–09:35, Allow Trading Until 11:00, Entry Mode to Wait For FVG, and Quantity Strategy to Risk Adjusted. Match risk and order settings to your account.

steps.title: Enable the strategy
steps.body: After reviewing parameters, check Enabled, then OK to activate the strategy on the chart.

steps.title: Chart Trader
steps.body: Enable Chart Trader on the toolbar. Confirm the correct account, ATM Strategy set to None, and order quantity matches your risk plan.

steps.title: Strategy control panel
steps.body: When the strategy runs, the on-chart control panel appears: arm long/short, close positions, adjust quantity, move stop to breakeven. License status and expiration show at the top.

license.title: License activation
steps: Enable Chart Trader on the chart.
Open the strategy license panel on the chart.
When valid, a green message confirms the license is active and shows the expiration date.
license.note: The strategy does not execute trades until the license is valid.

coreLogic.en: Defines an opening range in a configurable time window (example: 09:30–09:35 EST).
Trades a breakout of that range; a retest is often part of the setup.
Entry can use Wait For FVG or other modes your build supports.
You can cap the session with an end time (example: 11:00 EST).

items.value: On (chart); global historical tick data in Tools → Options → Market Data

disclaimerEn: The metrics card on this strategy mirrors the NinjaTrader Summary ($) example above when loaded from the catalog. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Not investment advice.
